titleStmt.title: SII 8.372: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 372. (A.R. No. 90-A of 1903). ON THE SAME ROCK.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷutyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvana
malladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttami
ralu jayantīpurada nelevīḍinalu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyutta tatpādapa
dmōpajīvigaḷ © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara vijayalakṣmīśvaraṁ cōḷakaṭakakarituragapaṭusubhaṭanicayavijitabahuparibaḷa
timirakhaṇḍanapratāpamārttaṇḍa nikarakoḷgaṇḍaṁ draviḷamaṇḍaḷikaśiraḥkhaṇḍanaṁ maṇḍaḷikamukhamaṇḍanaṁ nedaṭamaṇḍaḷikatārakāsurāri daśavarnnamurāri mitramaṇḍaḷikakuḷārnnavacaṁdra bhōgāma
rēndra nityavikhyātamaṇḍaḷikamāndhātraṁ neyaṁkakāṟaṁ pallikōṭapharaṭṭa gūrjjaradiśāpaṭṭa śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara kaṭṭida lagumalavaranallegu nāmādi samasta prasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā maṇḍaḷēśvara mallarsa
ru siṁdavāḍi sāsiramumaṁ tribhōgābhyantarasiddhiyāgi tuṁbuḷa nelevīḍinalu sukhadimire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷu śrimat sāvāsi śrīmadguttiya daṇḍanā yaka kēśavarājaruṁ śrī manmahā maṁḍaḷēśvara subhaṭa yanāyakaṁ
śrīmadguttiya doḍḍayanāyaka śrīmaccāḷukyavikrama varṣada 23-nē sarvvadhārisaṁvatsarada Āśvija bahuḷa 4 Ādivāradaṁdu dēvālyada narasiha viṣṇugruhada dēvara snānanivēdya
pūje punaskārakke dhārāpūrvvakaṁmāḍi kōṭeya dakṣiṇadiśāvaradallu biṭa kariyakeyi mattaru 100 gāṇa 1 tōṁṭa 1 nairitya diśāvaradalu brahmapuri geyyāgi biṭṭa kariyakeyi mattaru 12 paṇḍitara nelegōṭeya mane yidara cikkamane nivēśaṇa 1 svastisava sta
praśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāprathānaṁ kaḍitaverggaḍe kannaḍasandhivigrahi daṇḍanāyakaṁ kāḷidāsayyaṁgaḷa samarppaṇeyiṁ guttiyadhikāri perggaḍe haṁpaṇayyaṁgaḷu śrībillavarasaru pāḷeyada sāvāsi janārddana
bhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ kōṭeya Uttibhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ sāvirāṇanāyakanuṁ rājādhyakṣada sēnabōva nākarasanuṁ Apparasasu mintinibaru miṟdu śrīviṣṇudēvarige munnikiḍakaḷḷamana sthaḷa
paṭṭadēvarige kōṭeya nairityadiśāvaradalu māvuṁḍūra holevēreyalli yikkida kariyakeyi mattaru 100 manegivēśana muṁkoṭṭaru śrīmanmahā pradhāna kannaḍada sandhi
vigraha daṁḍanāyaka bha yoḍeyaṁgaḷadeseya guttiyadhikāri daṇḍanāyaka sōvarasaṁgaḷayistalada dharmmamartta lāgalu rājādhyakṣa daṇḍanāyakanuṁ sūryya
bhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ maṇḍaḷikabhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ rājādhyakṣa sēnabōva nākarasanuṁ candimayyanāyakaru mi(ṁ)ntinibaruvi(r)ṛdu vicārisi nōḍi keṟeyaṁkaṭṭeThe stone is broken here. varṣada 49-neya
krōdhisaṁvatsarada caitra suddha 6 Ādivāra viṣusaṁkrāntiyaṁdu ve(ṁ)mmayageryya sthaḷadiṁ paḍuva
[likkida mattaru 33 . sāmājñatāṁ bhāvinaḥ pārtthivānāṁ bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhaṁdraḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nrupāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 8.372 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
